ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "user_profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the business (e.g., Restaurant, Bar, Coffee Shop) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the business */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the business is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the business is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the business */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the business is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the business */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the business */,
  "business_hours" TEXT /* Business hours in JSON format */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the business location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the business location */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range of the business (e.g., $, $$, $$$) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the business account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the business account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* ID of the business being reviewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text comment provided by the user */,
  "review_url" TEXT /* URL to the review on Yelp */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "images" TEXT /* Images associated with the review */,
  "videos" TEXT /* Videos associated with the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* ID of the review being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "topic_modeling" TEXT /* Topic modeling results for the review */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions for the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role mapping */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role mapping was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_owners" (
  "owner_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each business owner */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* ID of the business */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the business owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the business owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the business owner */,
  "business_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the business owned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the business owner record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the business owner record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_owners_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* ID of the business related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., new_review, response_required) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* JSON object containing notification preferences */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme preference (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preference (e.g., en, es) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone preference (e.g., UTC-5, UTC+2) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_reviews_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* ID of the business */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the business */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the business */,
  "positive_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of positive reviews */,
  "negative_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of negative reviews */,
  "neutral_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of neutral reviews */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average response time for reviews */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_reviews_analytics_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_history" (
  "history_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each review history record */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* ID of the review */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* ID of the business being reviewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_performed_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_history_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_history_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_images" (
  "image_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* ID of the business */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., logo, cover photo) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_images_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)
